allow: Bash(node -e "const v=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const versions=JSON.parse\(v\); const v14=versions.filter\(v=>v.startsWith\('14.'\)\).slice\(-5\); const v15=versions.filter\(v=>v.startsWith\('15.'\)\).slice\(-3\); console.log\('Latest 14.x:', v14\); console.log\('Latest 15.x:', v15\);")
